title: taraxacum centrotum
intro: Taraxacum centrotum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and arthritis. The health benefits of Taraxacum centrotum include its ability to reduce blood sugar levels, improve liver function, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues or as a natural remedy for digestive problems.
